description_long: This is a well-used baseball with a classic white leather exterior and prominent red stitching running in a double-curve pattern around its circumference. The surface shows visible signs of wear, including brownish discoloration, scuff marks, and some faded blue ink markings, possibly from a signature. The stitching is tightly sewn and stands out against the worn leather, giving the ball a textured, tactile appearance. There are no visible brand logos, but some printed text and handwritten ink are partially legible on the surface. The ball's compact, spherical shape and standard size make it easily recognizable as a regulation baseball. Its overall appearance suggests it has seen significant use, likely in outdoor urban environments such as parks or neighborhood fields.
description: A worn, white leather baseball with red stitching, visible scuff marks, and faded blue ink markings. The surface shows signs of heavy use and discoloration.
description_view_0: This view highlights the central area of the baseball with prominent red stitching and a large, discolored patch, with faint blue ink visible near the top.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the blue ink marking, possibly a signature, and additional scuff marks along the lower right side.
description_view_2: This view focuses on a relatively clean section of the baseball, with the red stitching forming a symmetrical arc and less visible ink or text.
description_view_3: This side displays a clear portion of the blue ink marking and more pronounced wear and dirt along the lower edge.
attribute_stitch_pattern: Two curved seams with tightly spaced, raised red stitches running in a double-helix pattern around the ball.
attribute_visible_wear_or_scuff_marks: Multiple brownish scuff marks and discoloration patches are visible across all views, especially on the central and lower areas. Faded blue ink markings are present on the upper sections.
